evidence_summary: Montage/Training sequence to establish Carter's new role and the technology of the world.
Using a ruse, Carter joins the Zodangan air-scout squadron. He spends several days undergoing training in Martian aviation and mastering the mechanics of eighth-ray propulsion.
Wide shots of airships using eighth-ray propulsion
Close-ups on mechanical controls and flight maneuvers.
